Dept 505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:13:25 a.m. and concluding at 10:16:40 a.m.(D505)

Hyunjin Kim, Esq., appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Ronald Berry via Zoom Video Conference.
Plaintiff Ronald Berry not appearing.
Defendant Lugg Inc. not appearing.

Plaintiff's 2nd Amended Class Action Complaint for other Employment; Failure to pay minimum wage; failure to pay overtime compensation; etc. filed on April 6, 2023.

Proof of personal service as to Defendant Lugg, Inc. served on April 27, 2023.

Default entered as to Defendant Lugg, Inc. on May 16, 2023.

The Court addresses the issue with the Proof of service with Plaintiff's counsel.

The Court finds that the proof of service filed is not valid.

The Court continues this matter to give Plaintiff time to properly serve the Defendant and file the proof of service with the Court as well as other required documents.

The matter is continued to January 5, 2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 505.
